foot.description: A digital platform for showcasing user profiles, enabling individuals to present their information to a global audience.

home.description1: MyProfile is a digital platform that allows you to create and manage your personal profile, showcasing your information, skills, experiences, and achievements. Whether you're a student, professional, or freelancer. MyProfile helps you present yourself in the best light to public.
home.description2: In the future, MyProfile aims to become a professional international platform that enables the public to learn more about you and your professional backgrounds. The platform will also serve as a trusted source of authentic information, allowing important individuals and organizations worldwide to access reliable your profiles and details.
home.description3: Click and drag to spin · Scroll to zoom
home.description6: MyProfile is a secure and trusted platform approved and recognized by the respective government authorities in each country where it operates. It is widely adopted by users, including government institutions and partner organizations, ensuring reliability and credibility across both public and private sectors. All profiles undergo verification and compliance checks to ensure users are protected and the information shared remains safe, accurate, and trustworthy.

about.description: MyProfile is a web application developed in 2026 by Nicholas Tan Kae Jer, based in Selangor, Malaysia. In the future, it is expected to be further enhanced and maintained by a larger development team to improve its features and ensure long-term sustainability, allowing users to fully benefit from its services and experience.

login.description: Forgot your password? No worries. We will send a temporary password to the email address linked to your account. Please provide your identification number below for verification purposes. If you no longer remember the email address associated with this account, you may contact the website administrator for further assistance.
login.modaldescription1: Remember login back to update your latest personal information.
login.modaldescription2: Please register back account if you miss us.
login.modaldescription4: This account is temporary blocked, please inform to MyProfile Team to get more information.

setting.description1: BlueTick Badge is a verification badge that indicates a user's identity and personal information have been reviewed and authenticated by the MyProfile administration team. This badge confirms that the profile belongs to a real individual and that the submitted information has been verified for accuracy. It helps enhance trust, authenticity, and security for all users interacting with the platform.
setting.description2: This Notification feature sends an email alert whenever a login is detected on your account. It helps you stay informed of any account activity and provides an extra layer of security for your personal information. You may enable this feature to enhance your account's privacy and protection.
setting.description3: You can manage your two-factor authentication settings here. When enabled, you will be required to complete OTP verification before successfully logging in. When disabled, you can log in using only your identity number and password without OTP verification.
setting.description4: You can adjust your profile visibility here. When enabled, only your friends will be able to view your profile. If disabled, your profile will be public and accessible to anyone.
setting.description5: Are you sure want to change your account password? If so, please enter your current password, your new password, and confirm your new password below. For security purposes, your previous password will no longer be valid after the change. Please make sure to remember your new password for future logins.
setting.description6: Are you sure you want to delete your account? If you are certain, please confirm your decision by entering your current account password below. Once confirmed, click the "Confirm" button to proceed. Please note that this action is irreversible and will permanently remove your profile and all associated data. Thank you for being a part of MyProfile.
setting.modaldescription1: Your password for this account is changed a new one. Try login with new password now.
setting.modaldescription2: You successfully apply the BlueTick Badge, please wait admin to reply.
setting.errorpassword2: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
setting.errorpassword4: Current password must be at least 8 characters long.
setting.errornewpassword2: New password must be at least 8 characters long.
